calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-27-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tomas Pena Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per. Marcos Pena is also present on behalf of Plaintiff/Respondent.
Manuel Noris-Bar Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

Parties are sworn. Marcos Pena is sworn.

Marcos Pena introduces the following exhibit:

Exh. 1: Lease Addendum

Manuel Noris-Bar Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Marcos Pena replies on behalf of Plaintiff/Respondent.

Defendant/Appellant introduces the following exhibits:

Exh. A: Opening Statement
Exh. B: Energy Statement 5/13/2021
Exh. C: Energy statement 9/9/21
Exh. D: Tomas Pena April statement for electricity

At the conclusion of the Trial, The Court takes the matter under submission.

Exhibits are retained the Court.

Judge: Sharon Reardon, Clerk: K. Septien, not reported, (624).
